languages.title: Puo
languages.subtitle: Khetha puo e sebelisoang ho pholletsa le sesebelisoa.
languages.noResults: Ha ho na lipuo tse lumellanang le patlo ea hau.

phone.label: Nomoro ea mohala
phone.searchCountry: Batla naha, khoutu kapa sehlomathiso sa ho letsetsa
phone.noCountries: Ha ho linaha tse lumellanang le patlo ea hau.
phone.tooShort: Nomoro ea mohala e khuts'oane haholo.
phone.tooLong: Nomoro ea mohala e telele haholo.
phone.invalid: Kenya nomoro ea mohala e nepahetseng bakeng sa naha eo u e khethileng.
phone.valid: Nomoro ea mohala e nepahetseng ea machabeng

auth.onboardingTagline: Motsoalle oa ts'ireletso ea botho bakeng sa linako lipakeng tsa "Ke lokile" le "Ke hloka thuso."
auth.createSubtitle: Khetha mokhoa oa ho saena ho sireletsa graph ea hau ea polokeho.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Re ne re sitoa ho tlatsa ho saena. Sheba khokahano ea hau ebe u leka hape.
auth.googleUnavailableTitle: Google Ho kena ha ho fumanehe
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Ho sebelisa seboka sa nts'etsopele ea lehae. Native Google Sign-In e sebetsa mohahong oa nts'etsopele.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Kopanya hona joale kapa tsoela pele ebe u e eketsa hamorao.
auth.northStarBody: Ho apara VL01 ho ka baka phallo ea polokeho ka lipompo le boits'oaro bo bolelele ba tobetsa.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Motsoalle oa hau ea bonolo oa polokeho 'mapeng le mehala.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear ka thusa ka mokhoa oa lapeng, mokhoa oa mohlokomeli, mokhoa oa tšohanyetso, mehala ea tšoarelo le tšehetso ea lentsoe.
auth.remindersReady: Likhopotso tse bonolo li se li loketse.

permissions.locationSubtitle: E sebelisetsoa 'mapa, libaka tse kotsi, ho fihla ka mokhoa o sireletsehileng le moelelo SOS.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving kopa sebaka e le hore bahlokomeli ba tsebe hore na thuso e ka hlokahala kae. U ka e fetola hamorao ho li-setting.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Litsebiso li tšehetsa ho kena le liketsahalo tsa tšohanyetso.
permissions.notificationsBody: Re sebelisa feela litsebiso bakeng sa likhothaletso tsa polokeho, liapdeite tsa tšohanyetso le likhopotso tseo u li lumellang.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Sebaka se boloka moelelo oa polokeho o nepahetse
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving sebelisa sebaka sa hau bakeng sa 'mapa oa polokeho, libaka tse kotsi, ho arolelana kapele le moelelo oa SOS. U ka e fetola hamorao ho li-setting.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: Litlhokomeliso tsa polokeho li hloka tsebiso
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving romella likhopotso tsa ho kena, lintlafatso tsa maemo a tšohanyetso le likhothaletso tsa polokeho tseo u li lumellang. Ha re sebelise litsebiso bakeng sa lipapatso.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Microphone e matlafatsa mehala ea polokeho
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving sebelisa maekrofono ea hau feela ha u qala mohala oa AI kapa mohala oa polokeho.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleTitle: Bluetooth e hokahanya liaparo tsa hau
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving sebelisa Bluetooth ho kopanya le mabenyane a NorthStar, ho bala boemo ba khokahano, le ho baka phallo ea polokeho ho tsoa ho wearable.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving sebelisa kh'amera feela ha u khetha ho nka foto ea profil kapa ho arolelana setšoantšo sa polokeho.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving boloka phallo ena e fumaneha ho tsoa ho Litlhophiso le dashboard.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Khetha lentsoe la motsoalle le utloang le sireletsehile ho le utloa.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Ts'ireletso e khutsitseng bakeng sa polokeho ea letsatsi le letsatsi.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Arolelana moelelo le batho ba tšepahalang.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Lipompo tse hlano li ka nyolohela ho litlhokomeliso tsa SOS le Guardian.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Fana ka lebaka le utloahalang la ho tlohela boemo bo sa phutholoheng.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Qala mohala oa nako ea 'nete ha o hloka tšehetso.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Leka ho kenya ts'ireletso ea ts'ireletso ea ts'ireletso ea

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Boloka mabenyane a le haufi ha a ntse a scanning.
jewelry.noDevices: Ha ho na lisebelisoa tse haufi tsa NorthStar tse fumanoeng.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth scanning e ne e sa khone ho qala. Ka kopo leka hape.
jewelry.scanFailed: Re ne re sitoa ho fumana mabenyane a haufi. Sheba Bluetooth, lula NorthStar haufi, ebe u leka hape.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth scanning e ne e sa khone ho qala. Sheba phihlello Bluetooth ebe o leka hape.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Sesebelisoa se haufi se felile. Lumella phihlello Bluetooth ho Litlhophiso, ebe u leka hape.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar nkile nako e telele haholo ho ikopanya. Ka mor'a moo, lokela ho atamela haufi ebe o leka hape.
jewelry.connectFailed: Re ne re sitoa ho ikopanya le NorthStar. Etsa bonnete ba hore e lefisoa ebile e haufi, ebe u leka hape.
jewelry.emptyTitle: Ha ho na lisebelisoa tse haufi
jewelry.emptyMessage: Boloka NorthStar qosoa 'me u be haufi le fono ena, ebe u skena hape.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Ho batla lisebelisoa tse NorthStar haufi le ...

home.noDevice: Ha ho na sesebelisoa se hokahaneng

map.finding: Ho fumana sebaka sa hau sa marang-rang ...
map.title: 'Mapa oa polokeho
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go preview; Mapbox etsa hore sebaka sa marang-rang se sebetse ka mokhoa o ts'oanang.
map.updateFailed: Re ne re sitoa ho ntlafatsa sebaka sa hau sa marang-rang. Ka kopo leka hape.
map.notRequested: Phihlello ea sebaka ha ea ka ea kopuoa. U ka e lumella hamorao ho tsoa ho li-setting.
map.permissionOff: Sebaka sa marang-rang se felile. E lumelle ho Litlhophiso ho tsepamisa 'mapa oa polokeho ho uena.
map.timeout: Sebaka sa hau sa marang-rang se nka nako e telele ho feta kamoo ho neng ho lebelletsoe. Tsamaea sebakeng se seng ka lets'oao le hlakileng ebe u leka hape.
map.savedEmptyTitle: Ha ho na libaka tse bolokiloeng
map.savedEmptyMessage: Libaka tse tšepahalang tseo u li bolokang li tla hlaha mona bakeng sa phihlello e potlakileng.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

contacts.title: Lipuisano tsa maemo a tšohanyetso
contacts.subtitle: Batho ba tšepahalang ba fumanehang nakong ea ts'ireletso ea ts'ireletso.

contacts.empty: Ha ho na lipuisano tsa tšohanyetso tse ekelitsoeng.
contacts.emptyTitle: Ha ho na lipuisano tsa tšohanyetso
contacts.emptyMessage: Eketsa motho eo u mo tšepang e le hore ba itokisetse ha phallo ea polokeho e ba hloka.
contacts.removeMessage: Motho enoa ha a sa tla hlola a hlaha ka har'a phallo ea hau ea tšohanyetso.
contacts.nameRequired: Kenya lebitso la motho eo u ka ikopanyang le eena.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Re ne re sitoa ho boloka khokahano ena. Sheba lintlha tse qaqileng ebe u leka hape.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Re ne re sitoa ho tlosa khokahano ena. Ka kopo leka hape.

device.title: Taolo ea lisebelisoa

friends.subtitle: Bahlokomeli, likopo le graph ea tšohanyetso.
friends.emptyTitle: Sebaka sa hau sa polokeho ha se na letho
friends.emptyMessage: Metsoalle le bahlokomeli ba tšepahalang ba tla hlaha mona hang ha ba ekelitsoe.

emergency.title: Maemo a tšohanyetso SOS
emergency.subtitle: Eketsa feela haeba u hloka tšehetso e potlakileng.
emergency.body: Sena se tla tsebisa phallo ea hau ea polokeho le ho lokisetsa mabitso a tšohanyetso.
emergency.notificationBody: Boemo ba hau ba tšohanyetso bo se bo loketse.
emergency.addContact: Eketsa mohanyetsi oa tšohanyetso ho Litlhophiso.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Sebaka sa ho arolelana sebaka se se se se loketse. Hokela backend share endpoint ho romella lihokela tse phelang.

quickShare.title: Ho arolelana ka potlako
quickShare.subtitle: Sebaka sa marang-rang se se se loketse.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tobetsa
capybearTap.subtitle: Tobetsa habeli NorthStar ea hau ho lahla lamunu ea polokeho.
capybearTap.body: Tsela ea boits'oaro e loketse wiring ea ketsahalo ea BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: U shebahala u le kantle ho marang-rang. Molaetsa oa hau o tla romelloa ha o kopanya hape.
errors.voiceQueued: Molaetsa o bolokiloeng. E tla romelloa ha motsoalle oa lentsoe a hokahana hape.
errors.voiceRetrying: Leka ho romella molaetsa oa hau hape ...
errors.voiceConnecting: Ho ikopanya ka mokhoa o sireletsehileng le motsoalle oa hau oa lentsoe
errors.microphone: Ho hlokahala hore ho be le maekrofono bakeng sa mehala ea lentsoe. U ka e nolofalletsa ho Litlhophiso, kapa ua thaepa molaetsa ho e-na le hoo.
errors.billing: Motsoalle oa lentsoe oa inthanete ha a fumanehe ka nakoana. U ka tsoelapele ka motsoalle oa hau.
errors.authentication: Motsoalle oa lentsoe o ne a sa khone ho netefatsa seboka sena. Kena hape kapa u sebelise motsoalle oa offline hona joale.
errors.timeout: Motsoalle oa lentsoe o ile a nka nako e telele haholo ho araba. Sheba khokahano ea hau ebe u leka hape.
errors.network: Re ne re sitoa ho fihlela motsoalle oa lentsoe. Lekola khokahano ea hau, ebe u leka hape kapa u tsoele pele kantle ho marang-rang.
errors.genericVoice: Ho na le ho hong ho ileng ha sitisa mohala oa lentsoe. Leka hape kapa u tsoele pele ka motsoalle oa offline.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving hloka phihlello ea maekrofono bakeng sa polokeho le AI mehala ea motsoalle.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving sebelisa sebaka sa hau bakeng sa 'mapa oa polokeho le likarolo tsa polokeho tse haufi.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving sebelisa Bluetooth ho hokahanya mabenyane a hau a polokeho ea NorthStar.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Khetho ena ea ho kena ha e fumanehe mofuta ona oa app.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Tsoela pele e le teko (bakeng sa nts'etsopele feela)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Mokhoa oa teko o sebelisa feela data ea bohata e bolokiloeng sesebelisoeng. Litšebeletso tse hoketsoeng ha lia netefatsoa, 'me seshene ena e qala bocha ha app e bula bocha.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Khoutu ea netefatso ha e sebetse kapa e feletsoe ke nako. Kopa khoutu e ncha ebe u leka hape.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Boiteko ba ho kena bo bongata haholo. Ema hanyane, ebe u leka hape.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Netefatso ea ho kena e nkile nako e telele haholo. Hlahloba khokelo ea hau ebe u leka hape.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Ha rea khona ho fihlella tšebeletso ea ho kena. Hlahloba khokelo ea hau ebe u leka hape.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Seshene ea hau e feletsoe ke nako. Kena hape.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: 'Mapa oa polokeho ha oa khona ho bula. Hlahloba khokelo ea hau ebe u leka hape.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Sebaka sa hona joale ha se fumanehe. Ho bontšoa sebaka sa ho qetela se bolokiloeng ho tloha ka %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Ha rea khona ho arolelana sebaka sa hau. Hlahloba tumello ea sebaka ebe u leka hape.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Sebaka sa ka se tlalehiloeng ka %{capturedAt} ke sena:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Sebaka sa ka sa ho qetela se bolokiloeng, se tlalehiloeng ka %{capturedAt}, ke sena:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Tumello ea Bluetooth e timme. E bulele ho Litlhophiso, ebe u leka hape.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth e timme. E bulele, ebe u leka hape.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Ho hokahanya ka Bluetooth ha ho fumanehe sesebelisoeng sena kapa mofuteng ona oa app.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Ha rea khona ho fumana NorthStar. E boloke e le haufi, hlahloba Bluetooth, ebe u leka hape.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Ha ho lisebelisoa tsa NorthStar tse haufi tse fumanoeng. E boloke e le haufi ebe u batla hape.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Ha rea khona ho hokela NorthStar. E boloke e tjhajiloe ebile e le haufi, ebe u leka hape.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Ha rea khona ho boloka sebaka sena. Leka hape.
releaseCritical.lastSOSAttempt: Boiteko ba ho qetela ba SOS
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Sekrineng sa ho letsa se butsoe; mohala ha oa netefatsoa.
releaseCritical.sosCancelled: E hlakotsoe; ha ho mohala o entsoeng.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Ho ne ho se na motho oa tšohanyetso ea fumanehang; ha ho mohala o entsoeng.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Sekrineng sa ho letsa ha sea khona ho bula; ha ho mohala o entsoeng.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Boiteko ba ho qetela ba SOS ha boa khona ho netefatsoa.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Mothusi oa lentsoe ha a fumanehe hona joale. Leka hape hamorao kapa u tsoele pele ka mothusi ea sebetsang ntle le inthanete.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
